holy_strike.name: Holy Strike
holy_strike.description: Setup/Builder: A strike infused with divine light. Generates 15 Concentration and 1 Faith Pip.

divine_mark.name: Divine Mark
divine_mark.description: Setup: Mark the target for divine judgment. Generates 1 Faith Pip and applies [Marked].

judgment.name: Divine Judgment
judgment.description: Payoff: Strike the target with absolute holy fire. Consumes 5 Faith Pips to deal massive Magic damage.

purification.name: Purification
purification.description: Payoff/AOE: A wave of cleansing light. Consumes 3 Faith Pips to heal all allies and damage all undead in the room.

aegis.name: Divine Aegis
aegis.description: Defense: Surround yourself or an ally with a holy shield. Reduces incoming damage by 60% for 4 ticks.

divine_grace.name: Divine Grace
divine_grace.description: Defense: Grant an ally [Unstoppable] and [Haste] for 2 ticks.

beacon_of_light.name: Beacon of Light
beacon_of_light.description: Mobility: Project a beacon and teleport to its location. All allies nearby are healed.

resurrection.name: Resurrection
resurrection.description: Utility/Signature: Return a fallen ally to life with 30% HP and Mana.

cleric_physiology.name: Cleric Physiology
cleric_physiology.description: Passive: Divine Vessel. You gain 10% bonus healing power and your Faith Pip generation is doubled when you are above 75% HP.
